opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I got over a bad flu two weeks ago, but now my chest aches deeply, my heart is racing constantly, and I can barely walk to the bathroom without gasping.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The chest ache and the racing heart started a few days ago and the breathlessness is getting worse — I'm scared something is wrong.

symptom_narrative.onset: the chest ache and racing heart came on about 3 days ago, roughly two weeks after I got over a bad flu
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days, and the breathlessness has been getting steadily worse
symptom_narrative.character: a deep ache in the chest; my heart feels like it's pounding and racing even when I'm just lying still
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the tiredness and breathlessness are bad enough that I've been staying in bed
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the racing heart is there all the time; the chest ache comes and goes
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting up seems a bit easier
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat makes the chest ache a bit worse, and any walking leaves me gasping
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really wiped out and short of breath; can hardly do anything without needing to stop
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — I was fit and well until the flu
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can barely walk to the bathroom without stopping to catch my breath; I've been staying in bed

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a severe flu-like illness about two weeks ago that I've since recovered from

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: some cough and cold medicine I took during the flu

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; previously fit and active before the recent flu

objective_data_offered.value: when I put my fingers on my pulse it was about 115 and it feels like it's racing all the time
37.3°C on the home thermometer this morning
95% on a fingertip oximeter at home
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home oximeter

objective_data_offered.value: I look pale and I'm a bit breathless just sitting up in bed, and I keep holding my chest
my ankles look a little puffy
